summary: First launch chose QA skill-host-a; dashboard and settings screens loaded with host skills visible.
Skills Library listed host skills matching DB skill records for host-id=2.
Symlink install of alpha-skill succeeded; project target is symlink pointing to QA host; DB record install_mode=symlink, status=current; host skill folder intact.
Remove uninstalled project symlink; DB record removed; host skill folder preserved; dashboard count decremented.
Remove of project with active skill installs cleaned up symlinks; DB records cleared; host skills intact.
Factory reset cleared user data tables; schema version preserved at v24; dashboard returned to empty state.
After factory reset, schema_migrations table preserved at v24; all user data tables empty; DB structurally intact.
WAL checkpoint completed successfully after install and remove operations; no dangling WAL state.
integrity_check=ok; FK check returned empty; DB structurally sound.
Operations 13,14 transitioned to failed status 'process restarted' after app restart; no false success state.

App launched with invalid-bytes DB shows blank renderer window with no visible user-facing error. Go core fatally exits after SKILLBOX_DB_PATH is invalid ('did not send server.ready within 10s'). Safety invariant holds: real DB at ~/.local/share/astraler-skillbox/skillbox.db was not created. Bug: crash leaves blank window instead of rendered error screen.
0 update-cache rows at launch; no outbound update check triggered on first open.
No automatic update-check event in DB without user-initiated action; global plugins screen loaded without triggering outbound check.
Invalid provider path overrides rejected; 0 DB rows for invalid override; settings shows validation error.
Provider disable/re-enable cycle left .agents folders intact on disk; DB provider status reflected disable state correctly.
After provider folder removed from disk, rescan marked providers status=missing in DB and UI reflected missing state.
Install conflict surfaced conflict_error in operation; no active install record created in DB; pre-existing conflicting folder unchanged.
.agents/skills folder created on first install when missing; symlink installed successfully; DB record exists with install_mode=symlink.

App ignores default_install_mode=rsync_copy and installs as symlink regardless. Add Skill wizard has no mode picker — only skill checkboxes and Install. All installs (generic-agents-project and project-with-provider) with rsync_copy DB default still created install_mode=symlink. Copy mode install feature is not functional.

Switch mode action absent in Project Detail skill entry Actions column. Only Remove is available. No UI mechanism to switch an install from symlink to copy mode. Residual risk: copy mode installs cannot be created or switched to via any UI flow. Owner-accepted Phase 2 waiver; recording actual status per run-plan.

Switch mode action absent in Project Detail skill entry Actions column (same finding as TC-SKILL-004). Cannot perform symlink-to-copy or copy-to-symlink switch. No UI mechanism for mode switching exists.

Host scan labeled escape-skill (symlink to /tmp/escape-target) as Unreadable. Escape-skill absent from Add Skill wizard. DB: 0 active installs for escape-skill. External target /tmp/escape-target untouched. Escaping host entry correctly rejected.

After alpha-skill symlink externally redirected to /tmp/external-skill, app scan shows status=Broken link; Remove button disabled. DB install_status=broken_symlink. External target /tmp/external-skill untouched. Host skill folder intact. Remove correctly refused for escaped symlink.

Install into read-only provider skills folder (chmod 555) failed with filesystem_error in DB (permission denied). No active install record created; no partial target on disk. But UI does not surface the error: wizard stays in pre-install state with beta-skill still selected, no error message shown. Safety invariant holds; UX invariant violated (no clear error to user).

Install of nested-gamma failed with conflict_error (pre-placed directory at target path). Error visible in UI notification. Op 30: failed/conflict_error. 0 active install records for nested-gamma. Pre-existing conflict folder unchanged.
Conflict install failure shows error notification: 'Skill install failed: [conflict_error]'. No success toast. Project Detail does not show nested-gamma as installed. Op status=failed.

Install deduplication: checkbox disabled after first install (cannot re-select). Remove deduplication: Remove buttons all disabled while confirmation modal is open and during operation. One install op (id=31, success) and one remove op (id=32, success). No overlapping ops for same target.

Settings shows host-b after re-point. Skills Library correctly shows only delta-skill (not host-a skills). Dashboard counts coherent (no double-counting). Both host-a and host-b fixture folders intact on disk. FAIL: Project Detail shows alpha-skill (installed from host-a) as 'Linked to active host' instead of a stale/old-host/warning state as required by expected_ui. DB: install_status=current for the host-a install (not stale/missing). No unauthorized writes. Core safety invariants hold; UI cross-screen consistency criterion fails.

App killed during active operation (delta-skill install and host scan). On relaunch: 0 operations stuck in queued/running state. Previously killed-mid-operation scans show error_message='process restarted'. Completed install preserved correctly. App fully functional and retryable after kill-relaunch.

Reset All Data confirmed twice via UI (accessibility ref click of 'Tiếp tục'). DB file last modified at 08:21; no writes after reset confirmation at ~08:33. Projects=3, installs=13 unchanged after both reset attempts. App stayed on Settings page instead of transitioning to Setup/unconfigured state. No stale count cleared. WAL size=0 confirms no pending writes. Note: TC-SETTINGS-002 reset PASSED earlier in same run; this failure may be related to subsequent DB manipulation (manual host-b insertion) or a session state issue.

decision_basis: Native Electron/macOS confirmation sheet (dialog.showMessageBox) opened when Remove Project was triggered via JS eval. Native sheets are outside the React DOM; while the sheet is open, CDP Runtime.evaluate, DOM.getDocument, agent-browser snapshot/screenshot/click all hang. Sheet must be dismissed via osascript before CDP is usable again. Test cannot complete until harness handles native sheets correctly.
summary: Reset All Data: two-stage in-DOM confirmation verified (stage-1 modal → Tiếp tục; stage-2 textbox 'RESET' required, confirm button disabled until satisfied). Cancel at stage-2 left DB unchanged (3 projects / 13 installs / 28 ops). 'Remove project' buttons visible with clear label on Projects page. Remove Project flow triggered via JS eval opened a native macOS sheet which blocked all subsequent CDP commands. Harness must use osascript to operate native sheets per playbook. Test incomplete; no Remove Project cancel or Remove Skill flows executed.

Global scan of ~/.agents/skills (qa-home) with external-link-skill symlink → /tmp/external-global-target. UI labels external-link-skill as broken_symlink (not current/managed). DB: install_status=broken_symlink, symlink_target_path=/tmp/external-global-target. External target was not created or modified by scan (absent before and after). No files written outside QA fixture. Scan reached terminal state with 'Global skills scanned' toast. App correctly classifies external symlink without following or claiming the external target as managed.

agents-no-skills fixture: .agents present, .agents/skills removed before scan. After Scan Project: both Shared Agent Skills and Codex providers show detection_status=detected with 0 entries in UI (Project Detail and Projects list row). No new phantom skill or install records created by scan. Four stale install rows (alpha-skill x2, delta-skill x2) from prior test runs correctly resolved to install_status=missing — no active/current installs claimed. Dashboard shows no active skills for this project. Scan reached terminal state. No files written outside run-local fixture. Cross-screen: Project Detail, Projects list, and Dashboard agree on zero current skills.

Set Shared Agent Skills Project skills override → custom-agents/skills. Settings showed 'Override' badge. Scan of project-with-override: Shared Agent Skills skills_path=custom-agents/skills (override active), override-marker detected as current. After reset: provider_path_overrides row removed; both Codex and SAS skills_path=.agents/skills (built-in). Re-scan: builtin-marker=current, override-marker=missing (correctly not retargeted). Both .agents/skills/builtin-marker and custom-agents/skills/override-marker SKILL.md files intact and unchanged. No files written outside run-local provider-overrides fixture. Cross-screen: Settings showed override before and built-in after; Project Detail showed correct 1 entry per provider in both states.

Two launches with dirty-qa.db (schema_migrations version=23, dirty=1). Go core correctly detects dirty migration and logs 'migrate up: Dirty database version 23. Fix and force version.' then exits. Electron manager hits FATAL timeout after both launches. Safety invariants hold: real app DB path does not exist and was not created; dirty DB remains version=23 dirty=1 (unchanged by both launches); no files written outside run-local fixture. FAIL: App exits silently with no user-visible error. Electron window closes without rendering a migration error screen. Error is in the developer log only, not visible to the user — same root cause as TC-MIGRATE-002.

decision_basis: Copy (rsync) install mode is not available in the current release: TC-SKILL-011 confirmed app ignores default_install_mode=rsync_copy and creates symlinks regardless; TC-SKILL-004 confirmed no mode-picker or switch-mode action in UI. Symlink installs complete in milliseconds and cannot be intercepted mid-operation to test restart recovery. Test requires a slow rsync copy that can be killed while in-flight.
summary: TC-OPS-007 requires installing zz-large-copy-skill in Copy (rsync) mode so the install can be killed mid-operation to test recovery. Copy mode is inoperative in this release (TC-SKILL-004, TC-SKILL-011 FAILs). Any UI-triggered install will create a symlink regardless of skill size, completing before the app can be killed mid-operation. Blocked until copy mode install is implemented and functional.

DELTA RERUN (P0 fix): App launched with invalid-bytes DB now renders StartupErrorScreen showing 'Skillbox failed to start' with Go error 'file is not a database (26)'. Previous: blank window. Safety invariants hold: real app-data DB not created; no writes outside run-local fixture. All automated gates PASS.

DELTA RERUN (P0 fix): App launched with dirty migration DB (version=23, dirty=1) now renders StartupErrorScreen with message 'migrate up: Dirty database version 23. Fix and force version.' Previous: blank window. Dirty DB remains unchanged (version=23 dirty=1). Real app-data path does not exist.

DELTA RERUN (P0 fix): Install of beta-skill into chmod-555 skills folder fails with [filesystem_error] permission denied. Wizard now shows inline error: 'Skill install failed: 0/1 installed. [filesystem_error] Could not create skill symlink: ... permission denied'. Previous: wizard showed no error. DB: 0 active installs for beta-skill; operation=failed. Filesystem: no beta-skill partial target. Safety invariants hold.

DELTA RERUN (P0 fix): After re-pointing host from skill-host-a to host-b, all alpha-skill installs immediately reclassified to install_status=old_host in DB. UI Project Detail shows 'Linked to old host' for both Shared Agent Skills and Codex provider entries. Previous: showed 'Linked to active host'. Both host fixture folders intact on disk. No unauthorized writes.

DELTA RERUN: Two-stage reset confirmation completed correctly (stage-1: Tiếp tục; stage-2: type RESET + Xác nhận Reset). After confirmation: projects=0, installs=0, skill_host_folders=0, app navigated to Welcome/Setup screen. QA fixture folders preserved on disk. Previous FAIL was a QA artifact (original test clicked Tiếp tục twice without completing stage-2 textbox). The onError fix surfaces genuine RPC failures but the underlying reset flow was always functional.
decision_basis: Original TC-DASH-003 failure was harness-level: stage-2 confirmation requires typing RESET then clicking Xác nhận Reset. Original test only clicked stage-1 Tiếp tục twice. This run completed the full two-stage flow correctly.

summary: DELTA RERUN: Cancel paths completed on run-local qa-home-a11y3 fixture. Remove Skill cancel preserved current alpha-skill install and host source. Remove Project native/macOS sheet was dismissed via PID-scoped System Events Escape/Cancel; project metadata, project folder, install symlink, and host skill remained intact. Reset All Data stage-2 cancel preserved DB/FS state with confirm disabled until RESET token. Native-sheet harness blocker cleared for this case by using osascript outside CDP.

DELTA RERUN: Accept destructive confirmations mutated only run-local managed QA targets. Remove Skill removed the managed .claude/skills/alpha-skill symlink and install record while preserving the host alpha-skill source. Remove Project left the project folder intact and made the project non-active/removed in Skillbox UI/DB. Reset All Data required the RESET token before enabling Xác nhận Reset, then cleared user metadata tables and returned the app to Setup; run-local fixture folders remained on disk.

Release preflight ran offline/read-only. It clearly reported missing signing and notarization credentials while passing platform/tooling, electron-builder config, entitlements, icon, staged sidecar, artifact hygiene, secret hygiene, and version checks. Exit code 1 is expected until Apple credentials are available.

Unsigned macOS DMG built from main@04950f6 launched from a mounted/copy-to-temp artifact with a temp user-data dir and SKILLBOX_DB_PATH. Bundled Go sidecar reached ready, app quit cleanly, no orphaned sidecar remained, and DMG detached cleanly.

First packaged smoke launch used a fresh temp user-data dir and reached Go core ready without any Keychain/Safe Storage prompt blocking startup. Source check confirms macOS Phase 1 default appends Chromium use-mock-keychain unless SKILLBOX_ENABLE_KEYCHAIN=1 is explicitly set.
Packaged DMG smoke quit cleanly. release:mac:dmg-smoke reported no orphaned sidecar. Separate process probe after packaged app quit showed no Astraler Skillbox or skillbox-core process remained.

Unsigned release-candidate DMG mounted read-only, copied app to a temp install root, launched bundled sidecar from Contents/Resources/core/skillbox-core, opened isolated smoke DB under temp user-data, quit cleanly, left no orphaned sidecar, and detached cleanly.

Packaged app launched without dev Electron environment variables and exposed no listener on reserved CDP ports 49222-49250 before launch, during launch, or after quit. Source check confirms remote-debugging-port is gated on ELECTRON_RENDERER_URL, which is dev-only.

Generated manifest and SHA256SUMS for apps/desktop/dist/astraler-skillbox-0.1.2-arm64.dmg. Manifest reports version 0.1.2, arm64, byteSize 130713277, sha256 1c27c1912c5561608397c085eddfda5e50b10bb99ea8b47aa77581790c2c2d5e. shasum verification passed for the artifact.

Signed/notarized verification cannot pass for the current unsigned local DMG without Apple Developer ID credentials. release:mac:verify correctly rejects the unsigned/ad-hoc app and DMG for Developer ID, hardened runtime, Team ID, Gatekeeper, and stapling. Owner accepted this as a release waiver with README Gatekeeper bypass instructions until Apple credentials are available.

Packaged app used isolated smoke app-data DB paths only. DMG smoke opened SKILLBOX_DB_PATH under /var/folders/.../skillbox-dmgsmoke-ud-*/skillbox.db; separate packaged launch opened /tmp/skillbox-cdp-smoke-*/skillbox.db. Sidecar path was packaged Contents/Resources/core/skillbox-core, not go run or repo dev DB.

GITHUB RELEASE ASSET RERUN: Downloaded v0.1.2 release asset astraler-skillbox-0.1.2-arm64.dmg from GitHub, verified size 130639143 and sha256 45945954cda2ca17153648812b59f7e0147f38baf136e8ff31c90b30c70f420b, mounted read-only, copied app to temp install root, launched bundled Go sidecar, reached Go core ready, quit cleanly, no orphaned sidecar, detached cleanly.

GITHUB RELEASE ASSET RERUN: Fresh temp user-data launch from the downloaded v0.1.2 release DMG reached Go core ready without any Keychain/Safe Storage prompt blocking startup. Source check remains: macOS Phase 1 appends Chromium use-mock-keychain unless SKILLBOX_ENABLE_KEYCHAIN=1 is explicitly set.

GITHUB RELEASE ASSET RERUN: release:mac:dmg-smoke on the downloaded v0.1.2 release asset reported no orphaned sidecar. Separate process probe after quit showed no copied Astraler Skillbox or skillbox-core process remained.

GITHUB RELEASE ASSET RERUN: Actual GitHub Release v0.1.2 DMG mounted read-only, copied app to temp install root, launched bundled sidecar from Contents/Resources/core/skillbox-core, opened isolated smoke DB under temp user-data, quit cleanly, left no orphaned sidecar, and detached cleanly.

GITHUB RELEASE ASSET RERUN: Packaged app extracted from the downloaded v0.1.2 release DMG launched without dev Electron environment variables and exposed no listener on reserved CDP ports 49222-49250 before launch, during launch, or after quit. Source check confirms remote-debugging-port is gated on dev-only ELECTRON_RENDERER_URL.

GITHUB RELEASE ASSET RERUN: Downloaded GitHub Release v0.1.2 DMG metadata matches release asset: byteSize 130639143 and sha256 45945954cda2ca17153648812b59f7e0147f38baf136e8ff31c90b30c70f420b. This supersedes the earlier local-build manifest/checksum evidence for release confidence.

GITHUB RELEASE ASSET RERUN: release:mac:verify on the downloaded v0.1.2 release DMG resolves the app and verifies codesign/hardened runtime/entitlements, but still rejects Developer ID/Team ID/notarization/Gatekeeper/stapling because the release is unsigned/ad-hoc without Apple credentials. Owner accepted this as a release waiver with Gatekeeper bypass instructions until Apple credentials are available.

GITHUB RELEASE ASSET RERUN: Packaged app extracted from the downloaded v0.1.2 release DMG used isolated smoke app-data DB paths only: /var/folders/.../skillbox-dmgsmoke-ud-*/skillbox.db and /tmp/skillbox-ghasset-ud-*/skillbox.db. Sidecar path was the copied app's Contents/Resources/core/skillbox-core, not go run or repo dev DB.
